name: ger40_asian_range_breakout_m15
hypothesis: GER40 frequently consolidates overnight and breaks out during Frankfurt/London cash open (07:00-09:30 UTC); a Donchian breakout of the overnight range on M15 captures opening momentum when volatility regime is expansive.

regime_filter.description: Require directional structure on entry bar to avoid chop-fade breakouts.

entry_rules.long: First M15 close above overnight Donchian high by >= 0.3*ATR(14) after 07:00 UTC and within 07:00-11:00 window; ADX(14) >= 18.
